description_long: This is a tall, narrow cabinet or shelving unit with a wood grain finish, likely made from engineered wood or laminate. The front features a single upper door, three open shelves in the middle, and a lower drawer, each with small round knobs for access. The sides are plain, showing the wood texture without any additional features or hardware. The top of the unit has a slightly protruding edge, giving it a subtle decorative touch. The overall design is functional and space-efficient, suitable for storing books, personal items, or supplies in urban environments such as hallways, garages, or offices. The color is a muted grayish-brown, blending well with modern or contemporary urban decor.
description: A tall, narrow wood-finished cabinet with an upper door, three open shelves, and a lower drawer, featuring a subtle decorative top edge and small round knobs.
description_view_0: The cabinet is seen from the side, showing a plain wood-textured surface with no visible hardware or openings.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the wood grain texture and the slim profile of the cabinet, with no visible shelves or doors.
description_view_2: The front view displays the upper door, three open shelves, and a lower drawer, all with small round knobs.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the plain wood-textured surface, mirroring the other side with no visible features.
